attacking_style: High-risk, long-range attacks from distance (75km breakaway attempts documented). Targets breakaway points rather than sustained climbing power, willing to expend significant energy for classification goals rather than stage wins.
team_tactics: Limited team support visible; operates as individualist hunting opportunities. Sent on long solo missions (Total Direct Energie/current team), suggesting tactical freedom for opportunistic moves rather than protected GC role.
terrain_preference: Moderate gradients and rolling terrain for breakaways. Exposed on steep gradients (20%+ documented weakness) and lacks explosive acceleration on punchy climbs when pace intensifies.
vulnerability: Steep gradient climbing (20%+) where caught with 1.5km to go. Cannot match accelerations from fresh GC riders or explosive puncheurs like Alaphilippe on steep ramps. Sustained power inadequate against high-intensity attacks late in climbs.
key_patterns: Long-range breakaway specialist: documented attacking 75km from finish, prioritizing exposure over efficiency.
Repeatedly caught/dropped on steepest sections when GC riders or fresh climbers attack late.
Points classification hunter: willing to burn matches for intermediate points rather than conserving for finish.
Lacks finishing acceleration: cannot close gaps or respond when gradients exceed 15-20% against quality.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows tactical ambition (75km effort) but unchanged limitations on steep climbs, consistent with historical weaknesses from 2019-2021
